title: Scyap’s Seagull Mod
description: This mod adds seagulls (Particularly the red-billed gull) into Minecraft
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_8Bq5awi6O4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Mod Information:
This mod adds seagulls (Particularly the red-billed gull that can be found in Sydney and Melbourne) into Minecraft that can steal your food whenever you hold it in your hand or dropped it as an item entity

The seagull also includes a special "more realistic" flying animation and a landing animation 

Features:
- Seagulls have custom seagull sounds.
- Seagulls can fly in short distances.
- Seagulls can float on water.
- Seagulls shall spawn in stony shore, beach and mangrove swamp biomes.
- Seagulls can lay seagull eggs like how chicken lay eggs.
- Seagulls will approach and steal food items from players when the food item is being held in survival mode (Will not steal again after stealing the first time).
- Seagulls will attack fish entities and pick up the food item entity.
- Seagulls that have stolen and eaten food items will convert the stolen food into bone meal after one minute when kept in their inventory slot.
